nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment file for the React frontend, declaring the REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL variable used to point the client at the backend API.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Standard Create React App documentation covering available npm scripts (start, test, build, eject), code splitting, bundle analysis, PWA setup, and deployment guidance.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM manifest for the React frontend, declaring dependencies (React 19, React Router, ReactFlow, Dagre, elkjs, axios, Tailwind CSS, html-to-image) and Create React App scripts for the family tree visualization client.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses react-scripts (Create React App) for tooling, with ReactFlow and Dagre/elkjs paired for interactive hierarchical tree layout and rendering, and Tailwind CSS as a devDependency for styling.
